title: 🕳 Time Fracture Cascades
name: Time Fracture Cascades
what_it_is: Chronological ruptures that cascade through local time—one breach leads to fractal temporal splintering, layering cause and effect.
how_to_use: his timeline split—ten versions try to fix what he broke
she walks through yesterday's echo while tomorrow bleeds in
animation_behavior: Scenes flicker through temporal states, character actions replay and fork, environment loops time fragments ---
